Title: DECISION - mid-poly with shaders or stay low-poly
Notes: SETTLED 2026-07-20: staying LOW-POLY. Mid-poly would have locked us to Forward+ and dropped the low-end/web target. Reopen only with playtest evidence after audio and hands land.

Title: Charged throw and catch verb
Notes: Tap lobs a catchable pass
column6: hold yeets. Fixed a real bug where every throw broke: impulse 6.5 on a 0.5kg plate launched at 13.3 m/s vs a 6 m/s break threshold. BREAK_SPEED retuned to 7.5 to sit between the two throw speeds.
